whole_model_parity.definition: A Rust executable consumes WRF initialization and matches an upstream integration trajectory.

areas.evidence: UPSTREAM.toml and scripts/fetch-wrf.sh pin and verify WRF v4.7.1.
areas.next_gate: Retarget only through an explicit issue and compatibility audit.

areas.evidence: All 93 active Test1 cases and both Fortran interfaces match the golden output.
areas.next_gate: Add cases when later WRF callers expose untested behavior.

areas.evidence: Typed dimspec, state, rconfig, and package parsing includes nested source expansion, physical source locations, signed package conditions, ordered scalar groups, reserved-slot-aware PARAM/P/dense indices, source-order activation and deduplication, six exact artifact goldens, and a direct executable WRF package oracle.
areas.next_gate: Typedefs, communication entries, generalized four-dimensional scalar metadata, and complete scalar-index artifact generation.

areas.evidence: Exact task_for_point.c decomposition, period.c parity, and deterministic local and four-rank MPI results.
areas.next_gate: Generated communication descriptors, multi-field aggregation, nesting, and broader process grids.

areas.evidence: Dependency-closed dry, acoustic, and specified-boundary kernels have direct pinned-Fortran parity; WRF physical boundary-zone assignment covers periodic, specified, nested, partial-tile, inactive, and IEEE cases; the complete failure-atomic three-substep nonhydrostatic acoustic boundary stage matches 149 complete affected-field snapshots per case and all final fields across full periodic/specified/nested, partial, inactive, and IEEE-injected cases.
areas.next_gate: Compose halo exchange, polar filtering, and distributed patch ownership around the verified acoustic boundary stage.

areas.evidence: Kessler warm-rain microphysics matches all 660 mutable oracle values; the typed driver matches 8,624 values across seven branches; canonical and reordered Registry layouts bind directly into typed physics packages; and inactive plus deduplicated layouts retain exact generated-index parity in the Registry layer.
areas.next_gate: Couple Registry-selected Kessler precipitation through the ARW tendency trajectory.

areas.evidence: The typed classic-NetCDF restart schema is driven by borrowed Registry state metadata across scoped dimension forms, staggering, external ordering, field types, and time levels, with direct pinned-Fortran ordering plus byte-identical NetCDF-C and raw-bit differential parity.
areas.next_gate: Alarm metadata, Registry boundary/subgrid/4D scalar forms, NetCDF-4 policy, and resumed-trajectory parity.
Create separate workstreams after the ARW baseline.

areas.evidence: No Rust executable trajectory accepted yet.
